boundedRuntimeCorrection.usage: opt-in diagnostic transport for FOR-408; not a default rendering correction

runtimeSnapshot.observedBoundary: fragment shader source/coverage fields plus post-pass RGBA16Float readback
runtimeSnapshot.diagnosticShader: diagnostic in-memory FOR-408 per-subdraw contribution-isolation variant of shaders/aa_stencil_cover.wgsl
runtimeSnapshot.pipelineLayout: diagnostic-only render layout: binding0 AA uniform, binding1 fragment storage buffer

classificationReason: FOR-408 captures shader-side source color and coverage per inside/outside subdraw where the bounded M60 F16 fragment hook observes a selected FOR-401 coordinate. WebGPU fixed-function blending still does not expose per-subdraw dstBefore/dstAfter framebuffer state or an independent source-over replay input at this fragment boundary.
